'''Telkur Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] hidden inside the [[Transitory Mists]] in the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]] visited it in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Nashtah]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] and met with [[Jagged Fel]] who warned them of the trap they had walked into set by the [[Hapan]]s. It contained a [[Telkur Station Cantina|cantina]].

{{Station-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
